value_first.subject: Quick idea for {{company}}
value_first.body:
Hi {{name}},

I was looking at {{company}}'s {{what_you_looked_at}} and noticed {{specific_observation}}.

I recently helped {{similar_company}} solve a similar challenge by {{solution_brief}}. The result: {{specific_result}}.

I put together a quick {{deliverable_type}} showing how this could work for {{company}}. Want me to send it over?

Best,
{{your_name}}

curiosity.subject: Question about {{pain_point}} at {{company}}
curiosity.body:
Hi {{name}},

Quick question - how is {{company}} currently handling {{pain_point}}?

I ask because I work with {{target_description}} in the UAE and most are spending {{waste_metric}} on this when it could be {{better_alternative}}.

If this is on your radar, I'd love to share what's working for others in your space. If not, no worries at all.

Cheers,
{{your_name}}

case_study.subject: How {{similar_company}} solved {{pain_point}}

day_3.subject: Re: {{original_subject}}
day_3.body:
Hi {{name}},

Just floating this back up in case it got buried. I know inboxes are brutal.

The quick version: I can help {{company}} {{one_line_value_prop}}.

Worth a 10-minute chat?

Best,
{{your_name}}

day_7.subject: Re: {{original_subject}}
day_7.body:
Hi {{name}},

Last follow-up, I promise.

I put together a free {{deliverable}} specifically for {{company}} showing how you could {{benefit}}.

Want me to send it? Either way, I'll stop filling your inbox after this.

Cheers,
{{your_name}}

linkedin_connection.template: Hi {{name}}, I noticed {{something_specific_about_them}}. I help {{target_audience}} in the UAE {{value_prop}}. Would love to connect.

linkedin_followup.template:
Thanks for connecting, {{name}}!

I've been working with companies similar to {{company}} on {{service_area}}.

One thing I've noticed is that most businesses in {{industry}} are still {{pain_point_observation}}.

I recently helped a client {{specific_result}}.

Would it be useful if I shared how? No pitch, just thought it might be relevant.

testimonial_request.template:
Hi {{name}},

I really enjoyed working on the {{project}} with {{company}}. I hope you're seeing great results!

Would you mind writing a quick 2-3 sentence testimonial about your experience? It would really help me grow my business.

If you're open to it, a LinkedIn recommendation would be incredible too.

Either way, thanks for being a great client!

Best,
{{your_name}}
